full_text:
Yao Qiong
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yao Qiongwas born in Hanyang. Local leader who joined Jiang Xu’s revolt against Ma Chao. Yao Qiong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
